name: Marzapan
recipeIngredient: 200 g Dusting Sugar (10 x extra very fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sugar in a bowl with the almonds.
2. Add the eggs, lemon juice, and almond essence.
3. Mix until a ball forms.
4. Roll the dough into a ball and place on a dusting sugar-covered surface.
5. Knead by hand until soft enough.
6. Use to decorate cakes and drizzle with glaze in fine stripes.
